name: chisel
description: Plan tight, place inline markers, complete locally.

interface.shortDescription: Plan once. Mark intent. Complete locally.
interface.longDescription: Token-lean implementation workflow for engineers who review every generated line, use inline completion locally, or implement planned changes by hand.
defaultPrompt: Use Chisel: make a concise plan, ask approval, treat approval as marker insertion only, insert tiny two-line CHISEL/TODO markers, save session receipts, run chisel verify, then stop before implementation.
